content.en:
"Baishu!"

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor summoned a Primordial Black Beast from the late stage of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor, and he was also one of his right-hand men.

"Chief!"

The original ancestor of the hundred leaves came, and said respectfully.

"Something happened to the Land of Dust, resources were robbed, and a Dust Removal Gold Bead was lost, I suspect that some Primordial Black Beast has betrayed us, you go check it out!" ordered the Nine Dust Ancestor.

"Yes, Chief!"

The original ancestor of the shutter answered.

Subsequently, the Hundred Leaf Ancestor left the Nine Dust Domain and headed for the Land of Leaving the Dust.

Soon, the Hundred Leaf Ancestor came to the land of the Dust, and although he couldn't get in, he could let those primordial black beasts come out.

"All out!"

The Hundred Leaf Ancestor ordered.

After a while, one after another primordial black beasts came out of the Land of Leaving the Dust, and none of them dared to stay in the Land of the Leaving Dust.

"What the hell is going on?"

The Lord of the Shutters asked.

Immediately, a primordial black beast used the space-time pole to project the picture.

At this time, the original ancestor of the hundred leaves learned the specific situation.

"It's ......"

The Baiye Origin Ancestor found that this Triple Origin Ancestor cultivator had at least comprehended seventy-two extreme extreme paths, and such a demon was definitely a certain Saint Son level figure of the Fivefold Holy Gate!

"Could it be that one of these primordial black beasts has taken refuge in the forces of the Fivefold Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain?"

Immediately, he used the power of his Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to hook up the cause and effect of the mysterious person and the cause and effect of these primordial black beasts present, if there was a deep cause and effect between each other, then whoever was a traitor.

However.

"No !!"

He didn't see anything wrong.

Either these primordial black beasts are fine, or that traitor has mastered the ultimate path of cause and effect.

However, it was difficult to comprehend the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, and among the Fourfold Ancestor of the Nine Dust Domain, he was the only one who had comprehended the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, which was why the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor asked him to come here to investigate.

"You guys stay here first, and after a while, there will be a new batch of primordial black beasts to replace you!" the Hundred Leaf Ancestor ordered.

Subsequently, the original ancestor of the shutter left.

At this time, the numerous primordial black beasts breathed a sigh of relief.

They still thought they were going to die, after all, something so big happened, and it was normal to be killed by some primordial black beasts!

However, recently, the Nine Dust Domain has invaded Sunset Mountain one after another, and the losses are very heavy, so there is a serious lack of Primordial Black Beasts, otherwise they will really be executed.

......

Nine Dust Domains.

The original ancestor of the hundred leaves came back and reported the situation.

"I didn't find any problems, forget about this matter, but you have to be careful next time!"

Nine Dust Origin Ancestor said coldly.

He didn't allow a second time like this.

Therefore, all the primordial black beasts in this batch will be replaced, and the next time they invade Sunset Mountain, let them go, and it is not bad to consume them as cannon fodder.

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian's replica body is back, and he is in a very good mood.

"Hahaha, this time I got a lot of resources, and I also got a gold bead from the dust, it's a big harvest!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

He may not have the holy art of leaving the dust golden light in his hand now, but he can obtain this holy art through the Voidless Heaven Gate, and then he can go to cultivate the holy art of leaving the dust golden light.

"I only have one Dust Separation Gold Bead in my hand, if I cultivate directly, I will definitely fail, I must find a way to increase the success rate!" Ye Tian muttered.

How to increase the success rate of the holy art of Dust Golden Light?

Ye Tian thought about it, and then thought of a way, that is, to copy the Dust Separation Gold Bead, and then comprehend the mystery of the Dust Separation Gold Bead, thoroughly comprehend the internal power of the Separation Morning Gold Bead, and then use the real Dust Separation Gold Bead for cultivation.

Of course, the premise is to obtain the inheritance of the holy art of Leaving the Dust Golden Light before you can conduct research!

......

There is no empty heavenly gate.

Ye Tian continued to inquire about the information of the holy art of leaving the dust and golden light through the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and found that the Voidless Heavenly Gate did not currently have the inheritance of this holy art, but the Void Tooth Holy Gate did.

But it wasn't easy for him to obtain the Dust Golden Light Saint Technique Inheritance from the Void Tooth Holy Gate!

"Looks like I'm going to have to show some talent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he came to meet one of the fourfold ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, the Bitter Sea Ancestor.

Although Ye Tian is a core disciple, he has the treatment of a Daozi, so he is qualified to come to meet the Bitter Sea Ancestor, otherwise he will not even be able to see the face of the Bitter Sea Ancestor.

"Endless Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

Bitter Sea Ancestor asked.

Ye Tian said directly: "Lord Bitter Sea Ancestor, the disciple wants to obtain the inheritance of the golden light from the Void Tooth Holy Gate, I don't know if there is a way?"

"Leaving the Dust Golden Light, what do you want this holy art for? Could it be that you have obtained the Dust Separation Golden Bead?" said the Bitter Sea Ancestor with some surprise.

"Yes, Lord Bitter Sea Ancestor!"

Ye Tian admitted.

After all, if he didn't have the Dust Separation Golden Bead, he would have no hope if he directly applied for the Dust Separation Golden Light Holy Technique!

However, the Bitter Sea Origin Ancestor said: "Endless Origin Ancestor, just one Dust Separation Gold Bead or even a few of them, it is not very useful, I am only a Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate who is practicing the Dust Separation Golden Light Holy Technique, if you sell the Dust Separation Gold Bead to him, you can definitely obtain a lot of precious resources." If you cultivate by yourself, it will be a complete waste!"

At this time, Ye Tian did not refute, but directly revealed the seventy-two extreme extremes on his body.

If it weren't for the fear of scaring the Bitter Sea Ancestor, he would even want to reveal one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths.

"Seventy-two Extreme Extreme Path !!!"

The Bitter Sea Ancestor was shocked.

What is the concept of the seventy-two extreme extreme paths, in the Void Tooth Holy Gate, the seventy-two extreme extreme paths are the standard of the Holy Son, as long as you comprehend the seventy-two extreme extreme paths, and engrave the seventy-two extreme extreme paths on the Pagoda of Will, then you can become a holy son, and you don't need any assessment.

In other words, if Ye Tian had already engraved seventy-two extreme extreme paths, then he would be able to become the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate!

"Bitter Sea Ancestor, do you think I need to please that Holy Son?"

Ye Tian asked lightly.

"No need!" said the Bitter Sea Ancestor hurriedly.

At this moment, he didn't dare to underestimate Ye Tian, after all, he was only a fourfold ancestor who had broken through with thirty-six extreme extremes!

And if Ye Tian enters the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he will soon become a Holy Son, and once he becomes a Quadruple Ancestor in the future, his status will be no less than him, and he will even surpass him soon!

"Endless Ancestor, in the future, you can call me the Bitter Sea Ancestor, you don't have to call me an adult!"

The Bitter Sea Ancestor grinned.

"Yes, Bitter Sea Ancestor!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the Bitter Sea Ancestor said, "I'll help you apply for a Dust Separation Golden Light Inheritance, or it won't be long before you can get it!"

"Thank you Bitter Sea Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

After that, he went back and waited.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for the Bitter Sea Ancestor to send the Dust Golden Light Saint Art Inheritance.

"It's still a good talent, if I continue to hide it, where can I get this holy art!" Ye Tian muttered.

The next step is to start practicing the Dust Separation Golden Light Holy Technique.
